title: cistanthe minuscula
intro: Cistanthe minuscula, also known as dwarf primrose, is a small flowering plant that belongs to the family Portulacaceae. The plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and glycosides. The health benefits of Cistanthe minuscula include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cognitive function, and support the immune system. Cistanthe minuscula is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever and respiratory issues.
